title: ageratina tambillensis
intro: Ageratina tambillensis, also known as Hierba de Limon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is valued for its potential to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Hierba de Limon include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems, among others. Herbal preparations of Ageratina tambillensis typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and stems, which can be consumed as teas or used topically in the form of poultices or salves.
